<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Contracts; interface MutationTestRunner { public function enable(): void; public function isEnabled(): bool; /** * @param array<int, string> $arguments */ public function setOriginalArguments(array $arguments): void; public function setStartTime(float $startTime): void; public function isCodeCoverageRequested(): bool; public function run(): int; }
